name: OnlyOffice Desktop
tagline: Open-source office suite with the best MS file compatibility
best_for: Students who need MS Office file format fidelity without paying.
steps: Download the free Desktop Editor for your OS
Open .docx / .xlsx / .pptx files — formatting is preserved better than LibreOffice in most cases
Save as MS format directly (no conversion needed)
notes: Often picked for offices because of high MS file fidelity. Has a cloud version too.
